name: Full Exclusion from Round 4
description: Clients collaborate normally for 3 rounds. In round 4, client 0 initiates an indefinite full exclusion.

round_1_rules.description: All clients should be on global track in round 1

round_4_rules.description: Clients 1, 2, 3, 4, 5 should share the global track, excluding client 0
Client 0 should be fully excluded from all tracks

0.description: Client 0 opts for full exclusion from round 4 onwards
